quicksight.template.datetimevaluewhenuns: The configuration that defines the default value of a `DateTime` parameter when a value has not been set.

quicksight.template.datetimevaluewhenuns.Description: A custom value that's used when the value of a parameter isn't set.
The built-in options for default values. The value can be one of the following:  +  `RECOMMENDED`: The recommended value.+  `NULL`: The `NULL` value.
